title: Rage of the Werewolf
overview: Jake, a lycanthrope, on the run from the authorities in an apocalyptic New York City, must make his way past helicopters, police, subterranean mutants, bounty hunters and even a spy in his midst in order to discover exactly what his evil werewolf brother is up to and resolve the bad blood that flows between them...
